evaluation.overall_comment: The translation contains the correct Spanish vocabulary and covers the full technical scope of the original podcast. However, it is fundamentally flawed due to extensive structural defects: inline meta-commentary, alternative phrasing options, and mixed-language fragments are directly embedded in the target text. This renders the output unusable as a final translation and violates core localization standards.
